params.name: input_raster
params.description: Input reflectance raster to normalize (single band or multi-band stack).

params.name: input_dem
params.description: DEM raster co-registered with the input (same grid or will be resampled to match).

params.name: solar_zenith_deg
params.description: Solar zenith angle in degrees at acquisition time.

params.name: solar_azimuth_deg
params.description: Solar azimuth angle in degrees (clockwise from north) at acquisition time.

params.name: minnaert_k
params.description: Minnaert k coefficient in [0,1] (default 0.5). Only used when method=minnaert.

params.name: z_factor
params.description: Vertical exaggeration for DEM slope/aspect computation (default 1.0).

params.name: output
params.description: Output path for normalized raster (overrides output_prefix for single-output mode).

params.name: input_dem
params.description: DEM raster co-registered with optical bands.

params.name: bundle_root
params.description: Optional optical sensor bundle root directory (currently Sentinel-2 SAFE, Landsat, or DIMAP SPOT/Pleiades) used to auto-resolve required bands, QA when available, and solar metadata when explicit inputs are omitted.

params.name: input_red
params.description: Red band raster (optional when bundle_root is provided).

params.name: input_nir
params.description: NIR band raster (optional when bundle_root is provided).

params.name: input_blue
params.description: Blue band raster (optional). Auto-resolved from bundle metadata when bundle_root is provided.

params.name: solar_mode
params.description: Solar-angle resolution mode: auto, manual, metadata, datetime_location.

params.name: solar_zenith_deg
params.description: Solar zenith angle in degrees (required in manual mode).

params.name: solar_azimuth_deg
params.description: Solar azimuth in degrees (clockwise from north, required in manual mode).

params.name: acquisition_datetime_utc
params.description: Acquisition timestamp in RFC3339 UTC for datetime_location mode.

params.name: cloud_threshold
params.description: Optional cloud threshold in source band units. Auto-inferred when omitted.

params.name: shadow_threshold
params.description: Optional cloud-shadow threshold in source band units. Auto-inferred when omitted.

params.name: qa_mask_format
params.description: QA mask encoding: auto, landsat_qa_pixel, sentinel2_scl, sentinel2_qa60, binary.

params.name: mask_strategy
params.description: Mask strategy: auto, qa_only, heuristic_only, qa_plus_heuristic.

params.name: input_dem
params.description: Input DEM raster for terrain context and SAR normalization support.

params.name: pair_sar
params.description: Optional second SAR image for coherence-aware agreement.

params.name: thermal_bundle
params.description: Optional thermal raster for experimental three-modality fusion.

params.name: harmonization_mode
params.description: Cross-sensor bias harmonization mode: off, robust, conservative.

params.name: high_confidence_threshold
params.description: Threshold for high-confidence change zoning in [0,1].

params.name: max_zone_features
params.description: Maximum number of high-confidence change polygons to emit.

params.name: vector_output_format
params.description: Vector format for high-confidence zones: gpkg, geojson, or shp (default gpkg).

params.name: profile
params.description: [pro] Quality profile (fast, balanced, strict); selects the adaptive-threshold suite that drives pass/review/fail mission classification.

params.name: blur_mode
params.description: Blur scoring mode: off, fast, or full.

params.name: max_pairs
params.description: Maximum number of planned pairs for mode=set (default 24).

params.name: min_matches
params.description: [pro] Minimum accepted match count per pair; drives QA gate, fallback routing, and pass/review/fail classification (default 24).

params.name: min_match_count
params.description: [pro] Minimum accepted match count per pair for QC classification (default 24).

params.name: min_inlier_ratio
params.description: [pro] Minimum inlier proxy threshold per pair for QC classification in [0,1] (default 0.18).

params.name: qc_policy
params.description: [pro] Pair-level QC policy: strict, balanced, permissive (default balanced).

params.name: emit_pair_match_viz
params.description: Emit side-by-side pair images with tie-point lines (default false).

params.name: max_pair_visualizations
params.description: Maximum pair visualizations to write when emit_pair_match_viz=true (default 8).

params.name: qa_mode
params.description: QA mode: strict, balanced, permissive, auto.

params.name: block_size
params.description: Grid cell size in xy units.

params.name: max_building_size
params.description: Maximum expected object width in xy units.

params.name: elev_threshold
params.description: Reference surface threshold in z units.

params.name: high_confidence_threshold
params.description: Threshold used for high-confidence fraction metric.

params.name: density_window
params.description: Odd window size for local confidence-density proxy.

params.name: roughness_window
params.description: Odd window size for local roughness proxy.

params.name: hotspot_min_cells
params.description: Minimum connected hotspot size in raster cells.

params.name: hotspot_rank_top_n
params.description: Optional maximum number of ranked hotspots to include.

params.name: checkpoints
params.description: Optional checkpoint point layer for vertical validation.

params.name: fast_mode
params.description: Enable fast mode for quick exploratory runs.

params.name: block_size
params.description: Grid cell size in map units.

params.name: max_building_size
params.description: Maximum expected object width in map units.

params.name: slope_threshold
params.description: Minimum edge slope in degrees for off-terrain removal.

params.name: elev_threshold
params.description: Reference surface threshold in z units.

params.name: hillshade_azimuth
params.description: Sun azimuth in degrees for hillshade.

params.name: hillshade_altitude
params.description: Sun altitude in degrees for hillshade.

params.name: lidar_tiles
params.description: Array of LiDAR tile paths or a directory containing LAS/LAZ tiles.

params.name: sidewalks
params.description: Input sidewalk line or polygon layer.

params.name: sidewalks_epsg
params.description: Optional EPSG override when the sidewalk layer lacks CRS metadata.

params.name: resolution
params.description: Intermediate raster resolution in map units.

params.name: segment_length_m
params.description: Optional fixed segment length for line inputs. Ignored for polygon inputs.

params.name: buffer_distance_m
params.description: Neighborhood radius around sidewalk geometry sampled for obstruction.

params.name: max_tile_workers
params.description: Optional max number of parallel tile workers (0 = auto).

params.name: output_prefix
params.description: Output prefix for GeoPackage and JSON summary artifacts.

params.name: max_offset_distance
params.description: Optional maximum route offset distance in map units.

params.name: output
params.description: Output snapped event point vector path.

tools.display_name: Route Event Governance For Linear Assets

params.name: events
params.description: Input event vector layer (GeoPackage, GeoJSON, or Shapefile).

params.name: from_measure_field
params.description: Field name for interval start measure.

params.name: to_measure_field
params.description: Field name for interval end measure.

params.name: gap_tolerance
params.description: Measure gap smaller than this value is ignored (default 0.0).

params.name: overlap_tolerance
params.description: Measure overlap smaller than this value is ignored (default 0.0).

params.name: auto_fix
params.description: Automatically correct descending intervals and overlapping events (default false).

params.name: domain_rules_json
params.description: Optional JSON file path describing per-field validation rules (allowed_values, regex, min, max).

params.name: governed_events
params.description: Output vector path for QA-passed events.

params.name: issues_csv
params.description: Output CSV path for per-event issue log.

params.name: corrected_events
params.description: Output vector path for auto-corrected events (only written when auto_fix=true).

params.name: governance_report
params.description: Output JSON path for governance summary report.

params.name: remediation_queue_csv
params.description: Optional output CSV path with prioritized corrective actions by issue.

params.name: html_report
params.description: Optional output path for an HTML governance summary report.

params.name: control_measure_field
params.description: Control-point field containing known measure values.

params.name: route_id_field
params.description: Optional route identifier field in routes. Defaults to feature FID.

params.name: control_route_id_field
params.description: Optional route identifier field in control points. Defaults to feature FID.

params.name: from_measure_field
params.description: Output field for route start measure (default 'from_measure').

params.name: to_measure_field
params.description: Output field for route end measure (default 'to_measure').

params.name: snap_tolerance
params.description: Maximum control-point offset distance from route geometry (default 1.0).

params.name: events
params.description: Input event layer containing route intervals.

params.name: group_fields
params.description: Optional comma-delimited fields used for merge compatibility. Defaults to all non-measure fields.

params.name: gap_tolerance
params.description: Maximum gap allowed for adjacency merge (default 0.0).

params.name: events
params.description: Input event layer containing route intervals.

params.name: boundaries
params.description: Input boundary layer containing route measure breakpoints.

params.name: min_segment_length
params.description: Optional minimum split segment length to keep (default 0.0).

params.name: events
params.description: Input event layer containing route intervals.

params.name: original_routes
params.description: Reference routes containing prior calibrated measures.

params.name: route_id_field
params.description: Optional shared route identifier field. Defaults to feature FID.

params.name: snap_tolerance
params.description: Optional snapping tolerance used while detecting and splitting intersections.

params.name: output
params.description: Output topologically noded edge vector path.

tools.display_name: Emergency Scenario Routing And Accessibility Simulator

params.name: demand_points
params.description: Optional demand points for coverage KPI computation.

params.name: scenario_template
params.description: Optional scenario authoring template: custom|flood|wildfire|earthquake. Applies template-specific validation guardrails.

params.name: scenario_block_source_field
params.description: Optional network field used to derive scenario-specific blocked edges from blocked_value.

params.name: scenario_summary_csv
params.description: Output scenario KPI CSV with baseline deltas.

params.name: html_report
params.description: Optional output path for an HTML accessibility simulation summary report.

params.name: cost_method
params.description: Cost method: distance, mode_speed, edge_field, or temporal.

params.name: edge_cost_field
params.description: Optional numeric line field used as an impedance multiplier for segment length.

params.name: one_way_field
params.description: Optional line field marking one-way digitized edges (supports FT/TF/B plus legacy boolean values).

params.name: mode_field
params.description: Optional line attribute field identifying travel mode per segment; enables mode-aware service-area costs.

params.name: default_mode_speed
params.description: Default mode speed in coordinate-units per time unit when mode_field is provided (default: 1).

params.name: allowed_modes
params.description: Optional comma-separated allow-list of modes to include when mode_field is provided.

params.name: temporal_cost_profile
params.description: Optional CSV defining time-dependent edge costs (columns: edge_id,dow,start_minute,end_minute,value).

params.name: temporal_edge_id_field
params.description: Optional network field used to match temporal_cost_profile edge_id values (default EDGE_ID).

params.name: departure_time
params.description: Optional RFC3339 departure time used for temporal profile lookup.

params.name: temporal_mode
params.description: Optional temporal interpretation mode: multiplier or absolute.

params.name: temporal_fallback
params.description: Optional fallback when temporal row is missing: static_cost or error.

params.name: turn_penalty
params.description: Optional additive cost applied to non-straight turns at network nodes.

params.name: u_turn_penalty
params.description: Optional additive cost applied to U-turn transitions.

params.name: turn_restrictions_csv
params.description: Optional CSV of turn transitions using columns prev_x,prev_y,node_x,node_y,next_x,next_y. Optional columns: forbidden and turn_cost.

params.name: node_cost_points
params.description: Optional point layer providing per-node entry costs (e.g., intersection delay).

params.name: node_cost_field
params.description: Numeric field in node_cost_points containing non-negative per-node costs.

params.name: node_cost_snap_distance
params.description: Optional max distance from each node-cost point to a network node for assignment.

params.name: edge_cost_field
params.description: Optional numeric line field used as an impedance multiplier for segment length.

params.name: one_way_field
params.description: Optional line field marking one-way digitized edges (supports FT/TF/B plus legacy boolean values).

params.name: network_speed_kmph
params.description: Optional network travel speed used to convert path distance into travel time (default: 80).

params.name: html_report
params.description: Optional output path for an HTML fleet routing dispatch summary report.

params.name: snap_tolerance
params.description: Optional node snapping tolerance for graph construction.

tools.display_name: Market Access And Site Intelligence Workflow

params.name: sites_existing
params.description: Incumbent baseline sites used for existing coverage and coverage-gain calculations.

params.name: sites_candidates
params.description: Candidate expansion sites (required for user_supplied mode).

params.name: competition_sites
params.description: Optional separate competitor layer used for overlap pressure; if omitted, overlap falls back to sites_existing.

params.name: num_sites_to_select

params.name: min_new_site_separation
params.description: Minimum separation between selected sites in map units.

params.name: catchments_output
params.description: Output candidate-level catchment polygons (convex-hull trade areas with fallback square polygons when hulls cannot be formed).

params.name: market_action_queue_csv
params.description: Optional prioritized expansion action queue CSV.

params.name: html_report
params.description: Optional output path for an HTML market access and site intelligence summary report.

params.name: predicate
params.description: Spatial predicate: intersects, within, contains, touches, crosses, overlaps, within_distance.

params.name: strategy
params.description: Transfer strategy: first, last, count, sum, mean, min, max.

params.name: prefix
params.description: Prefix for transferred source fields (default SRC_).

params.name: network
params.description: Input line network layer (validated for contract parity).

params.name: depot_points
params.description: Depot point layer; each point can contribute one or more vehicles.

params.name: demand_field
params.description: Numeric demand field in stop_points (default: demand).

params.name: priority_field
params.description: Optional stop priority field using values like required/high/normal/low or numeric ranks.

params.name: allowed_vehicle_profiles_field
params.description: Optional stop field listing compatible vehicle profiles (comma/semicolon/pipe-delimited).

params.name: allowed_route_classes_field
params.description: Optional alias of allowed_vehicle_profiles_field for route-class compatibility rules.

params.name: depot_id_field
params.description: Optional depot ID field used in route/assignment outputs.

params.name: vehicle_count_field
params.description: Optional depot field for number of vehicles spawned at each depot.

params.name: vehicle_capacity_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding vehicle_capacity per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: vehicle_fixed_cost_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding vehicle_fixed_cost per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: travel_speed_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding travel_speed per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: max_route_distance_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding max_route_distance per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: max_route_time_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding max_route_time per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: vehicle_profile_field
params.description: Optional depot field defining vehicle profile/category token used for stop compatibility.

params.name: vehicle_route_class_field
params.description: Optional alias of vehicle_profile_field for route-class compatibility rules.

params.name: vehicle_fixed_cost
params.description: Optional fixed cost charged per dispatched vehicle/route (default: 0).

params.name: max_vehicles
params.description: Optional maximum number of vehicles/routes to construct.

params.name: max_route_distance
params.description: Optional maximum travel distance per route, including return to depot.

params.name: travel_speed
params.description: Travel speed in coordinate-units per time unit (default: 1).

params.name: max_route_time
params.description: Optional maximum route duration in model time units, including return to depot.

params.name: max_stops_per_vehicle
params.description: Optional maximum number of stops assigned to each vehicle route.

params.name: objective_mode
params.description: Route-construction objective: minimize_distance, minimize_vehicles, or minimize_cost.

params.name: apply_local_optimization
params.description: When true, applies a deterministic 2-opt local improvement pass to each constructed route (default: true).

params.name: apply_simulated_annealing
params.description: When true, applies a seeded simulated annealing refinement pass per route after greedy/local optimization (default: false).

params.name: sa_iterations
params.description: Maximum simulated annealing iterations per route when apply_simulated_annealing=true (default: 1500).

params.name: sa_cooling_rate
params.description: Simulated annealing cooling multiplier in (0, 1); default 0.995.

params.name: sa_seed
params.description: Optional deterministic random seed for simulated annealing (default: 42).

params.name: assignment_output
params.description: Optional stop assignment point output with visit order/load diagnostics.

params.name: network
params.description: Input line network layer (validated for contract parity).

params.name: depot_points
params.description: Depot point layer; first point is used as the active depot in this baseline implementation.

params.name: stop_points
params.description: Stop point layer containing paired pickup and delivery records.

params.name: request_id_field
params.description: Request identifier field in stop_points used to pair pickup and delivery records (default: request_id).

params.name: stop_type_field
params.description: Stop type field in stop_points containing pickup/delivery labels (default: stop_type).

params.name: demand_field
params.description: Numeric demand field in stop_points; pickup demand is loaded and delivered demand is ignored (default: demand).

params.name: max_vehicles
params.description: Optional maximum number of vehicles/routes to construct.

params.name: assignment_output
params.description: Optional stop assignment point output with request and precedence diagnostics.

params.name: network
params.description: Input line network layer (validated for contract parity).

params.name: depot_points
params.description: Depot point layer; each point can contribute one or more vehicles.

params.name: stop_points
params.description: Delivery stop point layer with demand and time-window fields.

params.name: demand_field
params.description: Numeric demand field in stop_points (default: demand).

params.name: priority_field
params.description: Optional stop priority field using values like required/high/normal/low or numeric ranks.

params.name: allowed_vehicle_profiles_field
params.description: Optional stop field listing compatible vehicle profiles (comma/semicolon/pipe-delimited).

params.name: allowed_route_classes_field
params.description: Optional alias of allowed_vehicle_profiles_field for route-class compatibility rules.

params.name: tw_start_field
params.description: Numeric time-window start field in stop_points (default: tw_start).

params.name: tw_end_field
params.description: Numeric time-window end field in stop_points (default: tw_end).

params.name: service_time_field
params.description: Numeric per-stop service time field in stop_points (default: service_time).

params.name: depot_id_field
params.description: Optional depot ID field used in route/assignment outputs.

params.name: vehicle_count_field
params.description: Optional depot field for number of vehicles spawned at each depot.

params.name: vehicle_capacity_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding vehicle_capacity per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: vehicle_fixed_cost_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding vehicle_fixed_cost per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: travel_speed_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding travel_speed per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: max_route_distance_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding max_route_distance per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: max_route_time_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding max_route_time per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: vehicle_profile_field
params.description: Optional depot field defining vehicle profile/category token used for stop compatibility.

params.name: vehicle_route_class_field
params.description: Optional alias of vehicle_profile_field for route-class compatibility rules.

params.name: depot_close_time_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding depot_close_time per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: break_start_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding break_start_time per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: break_end_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding break_end_time per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: break_duration_field
params.description: Optional depot field overriding break_duration per depot/vehicle template.

params.name: vehicle_fixed_cost
params.description: Optional fixed cost charged per dispatched vehicle/route (default: 0).

params.name: start_time
params.description: Route start time in model time units (default: 0).

params.name: travel_speed
params.description: Travel speed in coordinate-units per time unit (default: 1).

params.name: enforce_time_windows
params.description: When true, only stops with lateness <= allowed_lateness are eligible for assignment (default: false).

params.name: depot_close_time
params.description: Optional hard close time by which each route must return to depot.

params.name: break_start_time
params.description: Optional global break-window start time for all vehicles.

params.name: break_end_time
params.description: Optional global break-window end time for all vehicles.

params.name: break_duration
params.description: Optional global break duration applied once per route when break window is intersected.

params.name: use_priority_scoring
params.description: When true, ranks feasible candidates by projected lateness/slack before travel distance; when false, uses nearest-neighbour baseline (default: true).

params.name: max_vehicles
params.description: Optional maximum number of vehicles/routes to construct.

params.name: max_route_distance
params.description: Optional maximum route travel distance, including return to depot.

params.name: max_route_time
params.description: Optional maximum route duration in model time units, including return to depot.

params.name: max_stops_per_vehicle
params.description: Optional maximum number of stops assigned to each vehicle route.

params.name: objective_mode
params.description: Route-construction objective: minimize_lateness, minimize_distance, minimize_vehicles, or minimize_cost.

params.name: assignment_output
params.description: Optional stop assignment point output with time-window diagnostics.

params.name: weights_mode
params.description: Neighborhood mode: queen, rook, k_nearest, distance_band.

params.name: row_standardize
params.description: Apply row standardization to weights (default true).

params.name: inference
params.description: Inference mode: asymptotic or permutation (default: asymptotic).

params.name: num_simulations
params.description: Number of permutations for permutation testing (default: 999).

params.name: seed
params.description: Random seed for reproducible permutation testing.

params.name: output_distribution
params.description: Optional path to save permutation distribution as JSON.

tools.display_name: Utility Corridor Encroachment And Access Planning

params.name: corridor_influence_distance
params.description: Maximum distance from corridor to keep as a hotspot (default 30.0 map units).

params.name: high_risk_distance
params.description: Distance threshold considered highest risk (default 10.0 map units).

params.name: response_queue_csv
params.description: Optional output CSV path for dispatch-ready response queue with SLA guidance.

params.name: html_report
params.description: Optional output path for an HTML operations dashboard report.

tools.display_name: Parcel And Land Fabric Topology Compliance Workflow

params.name: min_sliver_area
params.description: Minimum area threshold under which parcels are flagged as slivers (default 1.0).

params.name: auto_fix
params.description: If true, runs topology_rule_autofix and writes corrected output (default false).

params.name: jurisdiction_template
params.description: Optional rule-template preset (generic | ontario_mpac). Influences default sliver threshold and report recommendations.

params.name: topology_violations
params.description: Output vector path for topology rule violations.

params.name: issues_csv
params.description: Output CSV path for topology validation report.

params.name: compliance_report
params.description: Output JSON path for compliance summary report.

params.name: corrected_parcels
params.description: Optional output vector path for auto-fix corrected parcels.

params.name: remediation_queue_csv
params.description: Optional output CSV path for prioritized remediation actions by issue type.

params.name: html_report
params.description: Optional output HTML path for the compliance dashboard report.

params.name: input_extent_epsg
params.description: EPSG code for west/south/east/north input extent (default 4326).

params.name: filter_preset
params.description: Feature class preset: all, roads, buildings, water, landuse, trails, parks, rail, amenities, boundaries, transit, poi (default all).

params.name: include_tags
params.description: Semicolon-delimited tag keys filter list, e.g. amenity;shop.

params.name: include_key_values
params.description: Semicolon-delimited key=value filter list, e.g. amenity=school;building=yes.

params.name: filter_key
params.description: Legacy single tag-key filter (deprecated; use include_tags).

params.name: filter_key_value
params.description: Legacy single key=value filter (deprecated; use include_key_values).

params.name: include_points
params.description: Include OSM node features with tags as Point geometries (default true).

params.name: include_lines
params.description: Include OSM way features as LineString geometries (default true).

params.name: include_polygons
params.description: Include closed OSM ways with area tags as Polygon geometries (default true).

params.name: clip_to_extent
params.description: Clip output geometries to the query bbox extent (default true).

params.name: split_output_by_geometry
params.description: Write separate outputs per geometry type (<output>_points|lines|polygons.ext).

params.name: output_epsg
params.description: Reproject output to this EPSG code; omit to keep EPSG:4326.

params.name: overpass_profile
params.description: Overpass endpoint profile: main, kumi, fr, or custom (default main).

params.name: max_elements
params.description: Maximum number of returned Overpass elements before an error is raised (default 50 000).

params.name: chunk_large_aoi
params.description: Automatically split larger AOIs into multiple Overpass requests (default true).

params.name: chunk_max_area_deg2
params.description: Maximum area per chunk in square degrees when chunking (default 4.0).

params.name: max_chunk_count
params.description: Hard cap on chunk count when chunking large AOIs (default 64).

params.name: chunk_parallel_requests
params.description: Maximum parallel chunk requests for large AOIs (default 1 = sequential).

params.name: cache_dir
params.description: Optional directory for caching Overpass JSON responses by endpoint+query hash.

params.name: cache_ttl_hours
params.description: Cache time-to-live in hours (default 24; 0 means no expiry check).

params.name: provenance_output
params.description: Optional JSON path to write query/provenance metadata sidecar.

params.name: output
params.description: Optional output vector path; when omitted, a temporary output is used.

params.name: input_raster
params.description: Input raw (uncorrected) image raster path. RPC metadata must be embedded in the file or present in an adjacent .RPB sidecar.

params.name: input_dem
params.description: DEM raster used to obtain terrain elevation for each output pixel. Should cover the full scene extent. If not in geographic coordinates, the tool reprojects as needed.

params.name: output_epsg
params.description: EPSG code of the output coordinate reference system (default 4326 geographic; specify a projected CRS like 32617 for UTM zone 17N).

params.name: output_resolution
params.description: Output pixel resolution in the output CRS units (e.g., degrees for geographic, metres for projected). Defaults to the approximate GSD of the input image.

params.name: resample_method
params.description: Resampling method for output: nearest, bilinear (default), cubic.

params.name: nodata_value
params.description: No-data value to assign to pixels with no valid source coverage (default same as input).

tools.return_type: tuple[Raster | None, Raster | None, Raster | None, Raster | None, Raster | None]

params.name: rule_set
params.description: Rule configuration as JSON array/object, CSV string, or file path. Applies fixes for supported rules only: line_endpoints_must_snap_within_tolerance, point_must_be_covered_by_line, polygon_must_not_have_gaps, line_must_not_have_dangles.

params.name: snap_tolerance
params.description: Tolerance for snapping operations in coordinate units. Defaults to 0.01.

params.name: dry_run
params.description: If true (default), emits change report without modifying input. If false, applies changes.

params.name: output
params.description: Output vector path for fixed features. If omitted, derived beside input.

params.name: change_report
params.description: Optional JSON change audit-trail report path.

params.name: rule_set
params.description: Rule configuration as JSON array/object, CSV string, or file path. Defaults to all 6 MVP rules. Supported: line_must_not_self_intersect, polygon_must_not_overlap, polygon_must_not_have_gaps, line_must_not_have_dangles, point_must_be_covered_by_line, line_endpoints_must_snap_within_tolerance.

params.name: snap_tolerance
params.description: Tolerance for line_endpoints_must_snap_within_tolerance rule in coordinate units. Defaults to 1.0.

params.name: output
params.description: Output vector path for violations. If omitted, derived beside input.

params.name: input
params.description: Input vector layer with observation points.

params.name: row_standardize
params.description: Apply row standardization to weights (default true).

params.name: cell_size
params.description: Output raster cell size (optional; auto-computed from extent).

params.name: input
params.description: Input DEM raster path or typed raster object.

params.name: smoothing_amount
params.description: Overall smoothing amount in [0,1] (default 0.65). Higher values increase the diffusion budget, especially at coarse scales.

params.name: edge_preservation
params.description: Edge preservation strength in [0,1] (default 0.75). Higher values suppress smoothing across major breaks-in-slope more strongly.

params.name: scale_levels
params.description: Number of pyramid levels for coarse-to-fine smoothing (default 3).

params.name: fidelity
params.description: Data-fidelity weight in screened Poisson reconstruction (default 0.45). Higher values keep the result closer to the source DEM.

params.name: output
params.description: Optional output path. If omitted, result stays in memory.

params.name: wetland_mask
params.description: Input wetland mask raster (>0 treated as wetland).

params.name: max_polygon_features
params.description: Maximum wetland polygon features to emit.

params.name: baseline_urban
params.description: Baseline urban extent raster (binary or fractional).

params.name: scenario_urban
params.description: Scenario/future urban extent raster (binary or fractional).

params.name: scenario_template
params.description: Planning scenario template for policy comparison outputs.

params.name: start_features
params.description: Start feature vector path (point or polygon).

params.name: end_features
params.description: End feature vector path (point or polygon).

params.name: constraints
params.description: Optional exclusion zone vector path (polygons to avoid).

params.name: cost_profile
params.description: Cost weighting: slope_only | slope_roughness | conservative. Default: slope_roughness.

params.name: terminal_anchor_strategy
params.description: Anchor selection strategy for polygon terminals: mixed | centroid_only | boundary_only. Default: mixed.

params.name: corridor_tolerance
params.description: Fraction above optimal cost for the suitability band (0–1). Default 0.15.

params.name: rainfall_intensity
params.description: Optional rainfall intensity proxy raster normalized to [0,1].

params.name: profile
params.description: Preset profile controlling susceptibility sensitivity: fast, balanced, or conservative.

params.name: factor_contribution_mode
params.description: Factor contribution output detail: none | basic | detailed. Default: basic.

params.name: susceptibility_threshold
params.description: Threshold in [0,1] for high-risk fraction reporting.

params.name: max_zone_features
params.description: Maximum number of risk-zone polygon features to emit.

params.name: profile
params.description: Preset profile controlling erosion sensitivity: fast, balanced, or conservative.

params.name: restoration_priority_mode
params.description: Restoration priority ranking mode: health_score_only | cost_weighted | ecological_gradient. Default: health_score_only.

params.name: ecoregion_layer
params.description: Level-3 ecoregion polygons for donor-pool filtering.

params.name: year0_landcover
params.description: Year-0 land-cover raster used for non-forest donor eligibility.

params.name: pre_period_ndvi_stack
params.description: Multi-band pre-period NDVI stack (recommended years -5 to -1).

params.name: tenure_status
params.description: Optional tenure/legal-status vector for exact-match constraints.

params.name: donor_pool_exclusion_distance_km
params.description: Exclusion distance from project boundary in km.

params.name: tenure_field
params.description: Attribute field in tenure_status layer used for exact legal-status matching.

params.name: calliper_elevation_m
params.description: Hard calliper for elevation in absolute metres.

params.name: calliper_slope_deg
params.description: Hard calliper for slope in absolute degrees.

params.name: calliper_soc_pct
params.description: Hard calliper for SOC as a percentage of the project-area mean.

params.name: calliper_ndvi_pct
params.description: Hard calliper for mean pre-period NDVI as a percentage of the project-area mean.

params.name: calliper_road_distance_km
params.description: Hard calliper for road distance in absolute kilometres.

params.name: exact_match_soil_texture_class
params.description: Require exact donor/treated soil texture class match.

params.name: random_seed
params.description: Deterministic seed used for bounded preview sampling.

params.name: parallel_trend_tolerance
params.description: Absolute treated-donor slope tolerance for pre-period trends (default 0.01).

params.description: Band index (0-based) for red band in baseline_bundle.

params.name: baseline_nir_band_index

params.name: current_nir_band_index

params.name: biome_class
params.description: Biome for carbon coefficient tuning: tropical_forest, boreal_forest, grassland_shrub, agricultural_cropland, wetland_aquatic, none.

params.name: profile
params.description: Detection sensitivity profile: conservative, balanced, aggressive.

params.name: zone_block_cells
params.description: Block aggregation size for verification zone polygons.

params.name: baseline_date
params.description: Optional baseline capture date (YYYY-MM-DD) for temporal uncertainty estimation.

params.name: current_date
params.description: Optional current capture date (YYYY-MM-DD) for temporal uncertainty estimation.

params.description: If true, auto-resolve common field aliases when configured fields are missing (default true).

params.name: moisture_field_name
params.description: Optional grain moisture field name for dry-yield normalization (e.g., MOISTURE).

params.name: target_moisture_pct
params.description: Target moisture percent for dry-yield normalization when moisture_field_name is supplied.

params.name: speed_field_name
params.description: Optional speed field (km/h) for telemetry QA filtering.

params.name: heading_field_name
params.description: Optional heading field (degrees) for telemetry QA filtering.

params.name: min_speed_kmh
params.description: Minimum accepted speed in km/h when speed_field_name is supplied.

params.name: max_speed_kmh
params.description: Maximum accepted speed in km/h when speed_field_name is supplied.

params.name: max_heading_change_deg
params.description: Maximum allowed local heading jump in degrees when heading_field_name is supplied.

params.name: header_field_name
params.description: Header/region field name used for reconciliation (default HEADER).

params.name: edge_radius
params.description: Neighborhood radius for edge detection (profile default).

params.name: reconcile_radius
params.description: Neighborhood radius for multi-header reconciliation (profile default).

params.name: normalization_radius
params.description: Neighborhood radius for local normalization (default depends on profile).

params.name: lag_correction_mode
params.description: Optional lag correction mode for pass points: none or distance.

params.name: lag_distance_m
params.description: Distance lag in map units for lag_correction_mode=distance.

params.name: filtering_mode
params.description: Filtering mode after pass-aware smoothing: standard or robust.

params.name: robust_mad_threshold
params.description: MAD threshold for robust filtering mode (default depends on profile).

params.name: z_score_threshold
params.description: Outlier z-score threshold for yield filtering (profile default).

params.name: mean_tonnage
params.description: Optional target mean yield after reconciliation.

params.name: standardize
params.description: If true, output standardized values instead of [0,1] normalization.

params.name: ignore_zeros
params.description: Ignore zero-yield points during pass reconstruction.

params.name: max_change_in_heading
params.description: Maximum heading change in degrees for pass logic (default 25).
